title: Exact Generating Function Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite generating-function Cauchy-product QF_LIA/Diophantine regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Coefficient-convolution contradiction where left=[1,2] and right=[3,4,5] force coefficient c2 = 1*5 + 2*4 = 13, but the malformed row claims c2 = 12.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional generating-function rows only when they add distinct integer coefficient, recurrence-prefix, or exact-rational solver pressure; keep closed-form extraction, convergence, and asymptotics in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed coefficient-extraction and Cauchy-product checks as deterministic polynomial obligations.
Replay generating-function witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation rather than pack-local Python only.
Keep the bad Cauchy-product row tied to checked QF_LIA/Diophantine evidence for the finite coefficient contradiction.
Keep closed-form extraction, convergence, asymptotics, and broad recurrence-solving theorems under Lean horizon until formal proof routes exist.
